content: OpenCTI GraphQL endpoint: POST /graphql. Auth header: Authorization: Bearer <token> + Content-Type: application/json. attackPatterns query returns connection with edges. Structure: {attackPatterns(first: 1) {edges {node {id name}} pageInfo {globalCount}}} - the totalCount lives in pageInfo.globalCount in OpenCTI's pagination model. Alternatively query with first:1 and check pageInfo. Bearer token = OPENCTI_ADMIN_TOKEN value from .env.
